name: Barbecued Chicken ( MW )
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into pieces; cut each breast half into halves.
2. Arrange chicken skin sides up and thickest parts to outside in an oblong baking dish, measuring 12 x 7 1/2 x 2 inches.
3. Mix remaining ingredients in a 4-cup glass measure.
4. Microwave uncovered on high (100%) for 3 minutes; stir.
5. Microwave until mixture boils and thickens, 2 to 3 minutes.
6. Pour sauce over chicken.
7. Cover loosely and microwave on high (100%) for 10 minutes.
8. Rearrange chicken and baste with sauce.
9. Cover loosely and microwave until chicken is done, 10 to 15 minutes, basting with sauce every 5 minutes.
